description: Import Xiaohongshu (RedNote) notes with media and categorization.

manifest.name: Xiaohongshu Importer

name: Xiaohongshu Importer

releases.author: bnchiang96
releases.description:
Version 1.1.3 of Xiaohongshu Importer.

Changes:

* Support added for Xiaohongshu `explore` URLs by converting them to canonical `discovery/item` links for import.
* README updated to include information about supported link formats.

Download `Xiaohongshu-Importer-v1.1.3.zip` below to install.
releases.name: Xiaohongshu Importer v1.1.3

releases.author: bnchiang96
releases.description:
Version 1.1.2 of Xiaohongshu Importer, released on October 19, 2025.

**Changes:**
- Merged community PR fixing XHS URL parsing bug to support new URL formats (e.g., updated regex to handle both old and new patterns).
- This resolves issues with importing notes from recent XHS links.
- Previous updates (v1.1.1): Updated UI text to sentence case, simplified command ID to `import`, removed top-level heading in settings tab, and used `Setting.setHeading()` for Categories section.

Download `Xiaohongshu-Importer-v1.1.2.zip` below to install.
releases.name: Xiaohongshu Importer v1.1.2

releases.author: bnchiang96
releases.description:
Version 1.1.1 of Xiaohongshu Importer.

**Changes:**
- Updated UI text to use sentence case per Obsidian guidelines.
- Simplified command ID to `import`.
- Removed top-level heading in settings tab.
- Used `Setting.setHeading()` for the Categories section in settings.
- Updated banner in `main.js` to reflect version 1.1.1.

Download `Xiaohongshu-Importer-v1.1.1.zip` below to install.
releases.name: Xiaohongshu Importer v1.1.1

releases.author: bnchiang96
releases.description:
Version 1.1.0 of Xiaohongshu Importer.

**Changes:**
- Moved all styles from JavaScript to styles.css for better theme compatibility.
- Fixed category selection functionality in the import modal.
- Fixed layout issues with the "Download media" option in the modal.
- Tested on Windows and Android.

Download `Xiaohongshu-Importer-v1.1.0.zip` below to install.
releases.name: Xiaohongshu Importer v1.1.0

releases.author: bnchiang96
releases.description:
Version 1.0.1 of Xiaohongshu Importer.

      **Features and Fixes:**
      - Added hardcoded '其他' category as the last option in the import modal.
      - Removed 'Others' from the default category list.
      - Made the "Download media" label clickable using proper HTML association.
      - Increased margin-top and margin-bottom for the download row to make it stand out.
      - Made the "Import" button full width of the modal for better usability.
      - Fixed issue where the cover photo was downloaded twice by reusing the first photo.
      - Updated plugin ID to 'xiaohongshu-importer' (lowercase alphanumeric with dashes).
      - Removed 'Obsidian' from the description.
      - Ensured main.js and manifest.json are included in the release ZIP.

      **Core Functionality:**
      - Import Xiaohongshu (小红书) notes with media and categorization.

      Download `Xiaohongshu-Importer-v1.0.1.zip` below to install.
releases.name: Xiaohongshu Importer v1.0.1

releases.author: bnchiang96
releases.description:
Initial release of Xiaohongshu Importer for Obsidian.
- Import Xiaohongshu notes with titles, content, images, videos, and tags.
- Customizable categories (e.g., 美食, 旅行, Others).
- Optional local media downloads with relative paths.
- Settings for folder, media, and category management.
releases.name: Xiaohongshu Importer v1.0.0
